name: tool-design-sprint-prototype-plan
description: Day 4 (Thursday) move of a Design Sprint that produces the planning artifact for the day. Output covers the prototype role plan (Maker, Stitcher, Writer, Asset Collector, Interviewer), prototype brief (what to build, fidelity bar, time allocation per role), canonical Five-Act Interview script (Welcome, Context, Intro, Tasks, Debrief), trial-run checklist, and Friday participant confirmation tracker. The actual prototype build is craft work outside the skill's AI invocation surface. Use Thursday
author: product-on-purpose
summary_zh: 这是设计冲刺第四天的规划助手，帮你快速生成原型制作与用户测试的筹备方案，解决团队冲刺后期分工不明、准备混乱的问题。
